Prometheus (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $126,477,084Details
International Box Office $275,971,181
Worldwide Box Office $402,448,265
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $19,456,226
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $28,342,149
Total $47,798,375
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A team of explorers discovers a clue to the origins of mankind on Earth, leading them on a journey to the darkest corners of the universe. There, they must fight a terrifying battle to save the future of the human race.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$51,050,101 (40.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.48 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:31.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$125,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,396 opening theaters/3,442 max. theaters, 4.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $190,033,409

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 8th, 2012 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
June 8th, 2012 (IMAX) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: May 30th, 2012 (Wide) (Belgium)
May 30th, 2012 (Wide) (France)
May 30th, 2012 (Wide) (Switzerland)
May 31st, 2012 (Wide) (Chile)
May 31st, 2012 (Wide) (Denmark)
Video Release: October 9th, 2012 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for sci-fi violence including some intense images, and brief language.
(Rating bulletin 2222, 5/9/2012)
Running Time: 124 minutes
Franchise: Alien
Cast, crew, or production detail: Intertitle, Legacy Sequel, Prequel, Prologue

Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

A team of explorers discovers a clue to the origins of mankind on Earth, leading them on a journey to the darkest corners of the universe. There, they must fight a terrifying battle to save the future of the human race.
